## Stage Checklist

- [ ] Gate 1 — Requirement is clear
- [ ] Gate 2 — PRD approved
- [ ] Gate 3 — Design approved by Product Owner
- [ ] Gate 4 — Architecture approved and story issues created
- [ ] Gate 5 — All story PRs merged
- [ ] Gate 6 — Final merge review complete
